mapper.sql: F.faq_no , F.faq_ctgry_cd , C.cc_nm AS FAQ_CTGRY_NM , F.faq_qstn_cn , F.faq_ans_cn , F.faq_sort_sn , NVL(F.faq_hit, 0) AS FAQ_HIT , F.faq_use_yn , F.faq_admin_id , TO_CHAR(F.faq_regist_dt, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') AS FAQ_REGIST_DT , TO_CHAR(F.faq_updt_dt, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') AS FAQ_UPDT_DT , ( SELECT LISTAGG(FA2.fa_target_role_cd, ', ') WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY FA2.fa_target_role_cd) FROM faq_auth FA2 WHERE FA2.fa_faq_no = F.faq_no ) AS TARGET_ROLE_TEXT
FROM faq F LEFT JOIN com_code C ON C.cc_ccg_id = 'FAQ_CTGRY' AND C.cc_cd = F.faq_ctgry_cd

if.test: ctgryCd != null and ctgryCd != '' and ctgryCd != 'all'

choose.otherwise: AND ( UPPER(F.faq_qstn_cn) LIKE '%' || UPPER(#{searchWord}) || '%' OR UPPER(F.faq_ans_cn) LIKE '%' || UPPER(#{searchWord}) || '%' )

if.test: (searchWord == null or searchWord == '') and keyword != null and keyword != ''

sql.if: AND ( UPPER(F.faq_qstn_cn) LIKE '%' || UPPER(#{keyword}) || '%' OR UPPER(F.faq_ans_cn) LIKE '%' || UPPER(#{keyword}) || '%' )

mapper.sql:
WHERE F.faq_use_yn = 'Y'
AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM faq_auth FA WHERE FA.fa_faq_no = F.faq_no AND FA.fa_target_role_cd IN ('ALL', #{roleCd}) )
mapper.select:
SELECT faq_no , faq_ctgry_cd , FAQ_CTGRY_NM , faq_qstn_cn , faq_ans_cn , faq_sort_sn , faq_hit , faq_use_yn , faq_admin_id , faq_regist_dt , faq_updt_dt , TARGET_ROLE_TEXT FROM ( SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER ( ORDER BY F.faq_sort_sn ASC, F.faq_no DESC ) AS RN ,
) WHERE RN BETWEEN #{startRow} AND #{endRow} ORDER BY RN

SELECT DISTINCT F.faq_ctgry_cd FROM faq F WHERE F.faq_use_yn = 'Y'
AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM faq_auth FA WHERE FA.fa_faq_no = F.faq_no AND FA.fa_target_role_cd IN ('ALL', #{roleCd}) )
ORDER BY F.faq_ctgry_cd

SELECT faq_no , faq_ctgry_cd , FAQ_CTGRY_NM , faq_qstn_cn , faq_ans_cn , faq_sort_sn , faq_hit , faq_use_yn , faq_admin_id , faq_regist_dt , faq_updt_dt , TARGET_ROLE_TEXT FROM ( SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER ( ORDER BY F.faq_sort_sn ASC, F.faq_no DESC ) AS RN ,
) WHERE RN BETWEEN #{startRow} AND #{endRow} ORDER BY RN

SELECT
WHERE F.faq_no = #{faqNo} AND F.faq_use_yn = 'Y'
AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM faq_auth FA WHERE FA.fa_faq_no = F.faq_no AND FA.fa_target_role_cd IN ('ALL', #{roleCd}) )
SELECT F.faq_no , F.faq_sort_sn FROM faq F ORDER BY F.faq_sort_sn ASC, F.faq_no DESC FOR UPDATE
SELECT fa_target_role_cd FROM faq_auth WHERE fa_faq_no = #{faqNo} ORDER BY fa_target_role_cd
